release_notes: Complete Visual Restyling & Brand Refresh — Comprehensive redesign of all logos and visual identity across the application. Updated all logo assets (16px through 256px, ICO, WebP variants) with a modernized ShibaClaw brand mark. Refreshed WebUI welcome screen, settings panels, chat interface, and profile selectors with cohesive visual language. Hacker Mode Visual Identity — New dedicated 'Hacker' profile avatar (ShibHacker.png) with cyber-shiba aesthetic for the security-focused persona. Fixed Local RAG Windows EXE Bundling, Real-time Hot-Reload for Local RAG Install & Uninstall, Clean RAG Dependency Uninstallation, Memory Leaks, Concurrency Locks, MCP Deadlocks, Timeout Clamping, Session Saves, Initialization Safety, Automation Session Duplication, Sub-agent Context Exhaustion. CI Pipeline & Build Environment Hardening. Core Loop Processing, FAISS Vectorstore Caching & Locks, O(1) History Append optimizations.

changes.note: Bumped packaged update manifest to v0.9.6.
Added WebUI login troubleshooting notice to update settings.
